notes: TypeScript-only production batch: 10 unique combos across react/non-react/self/backend-none/backended setups
Per combo verification: bts.jsonc marker checks + bun install + bun run check-types

BugAA_trpc_fets_context_missing_branch: trpc context template had no fets backend branch; auth+trpc+fets generated session:null context, causing protectedProcedure type collapse (ctx.session.user on never)
BugAB_root_check_types_if_present: workspace check-types command failed in templates without per-package check-types scripts (Nuxt/Qwik) with 'No packages matched the filter'
InvalidCombo_redwood_trpc: redwood + trpc is intentionally rejected by CLI (use --api none); this is not a template bug

Follow-up replacement verification surfaced and fixed BugAC_redwood_external_backend_paths: redwood package-path helper incorrectly targeted web/api paths for external backends; corrected to use apps/web/apps/server when backend != none
Local CLI retest after fixes: 3/3 originally failing bug rows now pass; additional redwood external-backend checks (auth none + better-auth) pass
